after.title: kanjivaram saree
after.description: Kanjivaram (or Kanchipuram) sarees are opulent South Indian silk sarees from Tamil Nadu, renowned for their heavy, durable Mulberry silk, vibrant contrast borders, and intricate gold zari work

after.name: kanjivaram saree
after.description: Authentic Kanjivaram sarees, handwoven by skilled artisans in Kanchipuram, Tamil Nadu, are crafted from high-quality mulberry silk for superior weight, longevity, and rich texture. They feature contrasting borders and pallu woven separately in different colors, intricate genuine zari work (silk thread dipped in silver and gold), and traditional motifs like peacocks, elephants, parrots, checks (kottadi), and temple-style zigzag borders. — Janardhana Silk House +5
